title: Adding a doc to a board for collaboration
excerpt: It would be nice to be able to create a doc and work on it amongst the team within the board. Could have a section below all the groups where the team in that board can collaborate on a doc or even a drop down being able…

posts.author: Ant214 (Anthony Ali)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to create a doc and work on it amongst the team within the board. Could have a section below all the groups where the team in that board can collaborate on a doc or even a drop down being able to work on multiple docs. As of now the doc has to be worked on outside of the board.

posts.author: Julia1 (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Anthony, this is a nice idea as currently we have difficulties on finding where each doc is located. Maybe this can help on that direction as well

Can you please provide me some more info on how are you using docs in your team and how would you benefit from such a feature ?

Thank you
